Power BI Developer NexionPro Bengaluru, Karnataka ₹20,00,000 - ₹25,00,000 a year Location Bengaluru, Karnataka Full job description Job Title: Power BI Developer Work Mode: Hybrid Location: Bangalore Experience Required: 0-3Years Notice Period: Only April joiners (Immediate or serving notice with LWD in April) About the Role: We are looking for an experienced Power BI Developer to join our analytics team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for designing, developing, and optimizing interactive BI solutions that enable data-driven decision-making across the organization. Key Responsibilities:  Design and develop Power BI dashboards and reports with a strong focus on performance and usability.  Build and maintain robust data models aligned with business requirements.  Write complex DAX measures including CALCULATE, time intelligence, and optimization techniques.  Perform performance tuning and report optimization for large-scale datasets.  Write advanced SQL queries for data extraction, transformation, and validation.  Manage Power BI Service, including workspace management and deployment pipelines.  Collaborate with stakeholders to gather requirements and translate them into BI solutions.  Work in Agile environments and participate in sprint planning and reviews. Required Skills & Qualifications: 3+ years of overall experience with strong expertise in Power BI.  Excellent understanding of data

response.0:
MATCH ANALYSIS:
The resume aligns well with the job description, particularly in terms of skills and experience related to data analysis and Power BI.

MATCHING SKILLS:
- Experience with DAX and SQL
- Strong communication and stakeholder management skills
- Experience working with large datasets
- Design and implementation of data sources (including power BI dashboards)
- Optimization of data pipelines

MISSING SKILLS:
- Experience in Microsoft Fabric
- Implementation of fact/dimension structures within star schema models

LEARNING ROADMAP:
- Learn about Microsoft Fabric and best practices for its use
- Gain experience with fact/dimension structures and star schema modeling
- Develop skills related to optimization of data pipelines
